title: anthoxanthum elongatum
intro: Anthoxanthum elongatum, also known as velvet grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of velvet grass include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Velvet grass can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a dried herb for various health benefits.
